courseSubtitle: Master application development with Flutter, Google's UI toolkit for building beautiful, natively compiled applications for mobile, web, and desktop from a single codebase.
courseDescription: You will learn basic Flutter programming with best practices, including creating beautiful layouts, architecting navigations between screens, connecting to the internet, handling data persistence, and using device features like location.

campLeaders.name: Manas Malla
bio: As the Google Product Expert for Android, Manas has over 8+ year of experience building for the Android ecosystem. He has built over 30+ applications for the Android ecosystem and has won the WWDC20, the World Ocean Science Congress Competition for his applications. 1 ,2

With over 65+ badges on the Google Developer Profile, Manas has been the Android Study Jams Facilitator in the past for Google Developer Groups Vizag, where he has taught over 350+ enthusiastic developers on how to build for Android. 5
He has been certified by The Cambridge Certification Authority with a whooping 99% in the Java Level 1-2 examinations when he was taking his Android Developer Program certification. 3 , 4

benefits.text: Flutter is Google's UI toolkit for building beautiful, natively compiled applications from a single codebase. It enables fast development and expressive, flexible UIs.

list.title: Single Codebase
list.content: Build natively compiled apps for mobile, web, and desktop from one codebase.

list.title: Fast Development
list.content: Hot reload feature allows instant updates. Expressive and flexible UI.

list.title: Beautiful UIs
list.content: Built-in Material Design and Cupertino (iOS-style) widgets. Supports animations, themes, etc.

list.title: Native Performance
list.content: Flutter compiles directly to native code, eliminating performance overhead.
